{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323032846FEE93A62E232332787AD"}"},"total":44},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7586269814096692030","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者有话说：
本书是作者的第一本小说，绝对原创。作者的写作态度就是：坚持原创，不用AI，拒绝浮夸，拒绝无脑情节。本书仿写乡村爱情，但是内容会与大家熟知的乡爱不一样，女生戏份较少，主要反派就是老谢一家，希望大家多多支持！！","text_exts":[{"e":64,"s":60,"text":"乡村爱情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B9%A1%E6%9D%91%E7%88%B1%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774207726332787AD%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227586269814096692030%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227579927946471689278%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B9%A1%E6%9D%91%E7%88%B1%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766317566,"group_id":"7579927946471689278","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"原创至上、拒绝浮夸、精益创作","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxL/4tIFsWogAgmaT7ShjKA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0050461e0db9477b96ae0def061073a7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795163&x-signature=mkrnckBBsUpsy3maYODtRjodfRw%3D","user_id":"92760616166","user_name":"骑蜗牛看夕阳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"92760616166","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_3","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.3","title_id":"author_level_3"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.3","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.3"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7579927946471689278","book_info":{"abstract":"欢迎来到不一样的象牙山村！
穿越成象牙山村的一位没有出现过的小透明，手握未来记忆，开局狂赚一个亿！看黄家富如何发展实业，建设美丽乡村，带领乡亲们共同致富奔小康！
本书套用乡村爱情的个别情节与人物，但是却和电视剧剧情不一样，以村民“黄家富”的创业史为纽带，展现象牙山里面人物的爱恨情仇！
既然是乡村爱情，那么除了电视剧中的情侣外，另外安排了几对新的情侣，展现村子里面的人物风貌！
本书无后宫，不种马，偏创业，为什么选择乡村爱情，是因为群众基础大，比较容易带入，但是却没有照搬电视剧剧情，很多都是原创，某些不合理的地方，是阅历和知识储备不足，请读者朋友们见谅！
本书的反派就是老谢家一家，会受到应有惩罚（比如坐牢、搬走等等），但是也不会太狠，毕竟是乡村题材的小说，也没有什么穷凶极恶的人！
老谢家虽然是反派，但是主角黄家富跟他们的接触不会太多，毕竟黄家富已经是亿万富豪了，没必要跟村里的小人物一般见识，大家说是不是！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/39457d654acf16a99fb006655bf06ae2","author":"骑蜗牛看夕阳","author_id":"","book_id":"7579927946471689278","book_name":"象牙山村的爱恨情仇","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b8a890","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9434人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7579927953501340222","read_count":"9434","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"468402"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.4","serial_count":"229","tags":"男频衍生,乡村,穿越,同人,发家致富,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/bbd15466492eda0a012fa8e5f5919dc0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779391726&x-signature=1AEiXV2F%2FDoLnyGwnmwzdIi6ujk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"92760616166","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"133"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323032846FEE93A62E232332787AD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_
